FOLDER_ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have access to folders outside your department.
MANAGER_DEPARTMENT_ONLY: Managers can only manage folders within their own department.
EMPLOYEE_VIEW_ONLY: Employees do not have permission to manage folders (view only).
DEPARTMENT_ID_REQUIRED: Department ID is required when an Admin creates a folder.
PARENT_FOLDER_DEPARTMENT_MISMATCH: Parent folder must belong to the same department.
FOLDER_HAS_SUBFOLDERS: Cannot delete a folder that contains subfolders.
FOLDER_HAS_DOCUMENTS: Cannot delete a folder that still contains documents.
